    Index

    A C D E F G H I L M P R S T U V 
    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Konstantenfeldwerte|Serialisierte Form

    A

    addAssigneeToDropdown(String) - Methode in Klasse view.MainView
    Adds a new assignee to the dropdown list if it does not already exist.
    addButton - Variable in Klasse view.MainView
    The button used to add a new task to the system.
    addComment(String, String, String) - Methode in Klasse model.Task
    Adds a newly formatted HTML comment to this task.
    addPropertyChangeListener(PropertyChangeListener) - Methode in Klasse model.ProjectModel
    Adds a property change listener to receive state change events.
    addTask(Task) - Methode in Klasse model.ProjectModel
    Adds a task to the list, saves the state, and notifies listeners.
    addTimeInSeconds(int) - Methode in Klasse model.Task
    Adds the specified amount of time to the total time spent on this task.
    app - Package app
     
    applyFilterAndSort() - Methode in Klasse controller.TaskController
    Applies the currently selected filter and sorting criteria to the task list.
    AppMain - Klasse in app
    Serves as the main entry point for the project management tool.
    AppMain() - Konstruktor für Klasse app.AppMain
     
    assigneeComboBox - Variable in Klasse view.MainView
    The combo box for selecting an assignee when creating or editing a task.
    assigneeFilterComboBox - Variable in Klasse view.MainView
    The combo box for filtering the displayed tasks by a specific assignee.
    assignees - Variable in Klasse model.Task
    The assigned users for this task.
